tools.name: check_subdomain_availability
tools.description: Check if a subdomain name is available on demo.st (e.g. "my-site" → my-site.demo.st).

tools.name: reserve_subdomain
tools.description: Reserve a subdomain for the logged-in account. One subdomain per account.

tools.name: upload_site
tools.description: Upload a .zip as site content for your reserved subdomain. Easiest for agents: zip_base64 (base64-encoded zip). Or file_url (public URL to zip). Or file_path (local path, when MCP runs locally).

tools.name: clear_site
tools.description: Remove deployed site content from your subdomain. Subdomain remains reserved.

tools.name: release_subdomain
tools.description: Release your reserved subdomain. Deletes the reservation, any deployed site, and all document DB data for that site.

tools.name: get_site_api_key
tools.description: Get (or create) the public site API key for your reserved subdomain. Embed this key in your static site and call https://api.demo.st/v1 with Authorization: Bearer <key>. Tenant is scoped by the key — never share another site's key.

tools.name: rotate_site_api_key
tools.description: Rotate the public site API key. The old key stops working immediately; update your site with the new key.

tools.name: list_collections
tools.description: List document collections for your site (api.demo.st document store).

tools.name: create_collection
tools.description: Create a document collection (lowercase letter start; letters, numbers, underscores; max 63 chars). Max 20 collections per site.

tools.name: delete_collection
tools.description: Delete a document collection and all of its records.

tools.name: list_records
tools.description: List records in a document collection.

tools.name: upsert_record
tools.description: Create or update a JSON record in a collection. Pass data as an object. Optional id to upsert a specific record.

tools.name: delete_record
tools.description: Delete a record from a document collection.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "get_site_api_key" references sensitive artifacts (authorization, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Get (or create) the public site API key for your reserved subdomain. Embed this key in your static site and call https://api.demo.st/v1 with Authorization: Bear…
